title: Man of the Moment
writer: Yves Mirande, Guy Bolton, Roland Pertwee
actors: Douglas Fairbanks Jr., Laura La Plante, Claude Hulbert
plot: Mary, who is infatuated with her boss, discovers that he is having an affair with one of her coworkers. Despondent, she leaves work and overhearing news of a suicide, impulsively decides to drown herself in the river. She turns ou...
